history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young East Asian woman with long, wavy brown hair is posing outdoors in front of a building with large windows. She is wearing a tight black t-shirt with a silver cross necklace and very baggy, distressed denim jeans that are light grey and dark blue, with white sneakers. Her left hand is in her pocket, and her right hand is touching her hair. The background shows a reflection in the window of trees and the sky, with some text on the glass that is partially obscured. There are red and yellow star flags hanging above the window. To the right of the woman, there is a textured concrete wall, a potted plant with lush green leaves, and a couple of green outdoor chairs. The lighting appears to be natural daylight, casting soft shadows. The overall mood is casual and stylish. The color palette is dominated by neutral tones of black, grey, and brown, with accents of green from the plant and red from the flags. The image has a watermark in the bottom right corner that says "Hypic".
